message:
test(mux,codec,vtparse): mux pane/tab improvements, codec tests, formatting fixes

Add tests and structural improvements across the mux, codec, and vtparse
crates, plus formatting corrections from rustfmt.

mux/src/tab.rs (+360 lines):
  - Refactor compute_min_size() to accept &Tree instead of &mut Tree,
    eliminating unnecessary mutable borrow requirement and enabling
    safer concurrent access to tab layout trees
  - Extensive test suite for compute_min_size covering:
    - Single-pane minimum size calculation
    - Horizontal and vertical split minimum propagation
    - Nested split hierarchies with mixed orientations
    - Edge cases: zero-size panes, deeply nested trees
  - Tab layout constraint validation tests
  - Split ratio arithmetic and rounding tests

mux/src/pane.rs (+51 lines):
  - Add PaneConstraints struct for declarative pane sizing policy
    (min_width, min_height, max_width, max_height, preferred ratios)
  - Unit tests for PaneConstraints construction, defaults, and
    constraint satisfaction checking

codec/src/lib.rs (+134 lines):
  - Additional unit tests for codec encode/decode paths
  - Roundtrip verification for key codec message types
  - Boundary condition tests for variable-length encoding

codec/tests/codec_coverage.rs (149 lines, new):
  - Integration test suite exercising codec from the public API
  - Multi-message encoding and sequential decoding
  - Error recovery tests for malformed input

vtparse/src/lib.rs (+35/-40):
  - rustfmt formatting corrections: import ordering, line wrapping,
    trailing comma consistency (no behavioral changes)

lua-api-crates/termwiz-funcs/src/lib.rs (+4/-4):
  - rustfmt import reordering (no behavioral changes)

mux/benches/event_bus.rs (+2/-2):
  - rustfmt import reordering (no behavioral changes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
